meta_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve no project ideas (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no project ideas. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Antigravity Template to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on SaaS ideas. Use this Antigravity project template and Claude Code to validate, build, and ship your MVP at record speed. Intermediate guide.
content.answer_block: The 'no project idea' trap is a failure of iteration, not imagination. Use the Antigravity template to scaffold a market-validated SaaS skeleton instantly. By pairing this with Claude Code, you transform abstract concepts into functional, revenue-ready MVPs, bypassing the typical 'blank page' paralysis that kills most founder ventures.
content.intro:
The silent graveyard of SaaS is littered with 'perfect' ideas that never saw a single line of code. You've spent weeks rotating concepts in your head, waiting for that elusive 'aha' moment that never arrives. Meanwhile, the market waits for no one, and your window to capture early adopters is closing with every day of inaction.

It is time to stop searching for the 'perfect' idea and start building the 'correct' one. The Antigravity project template acts as your architectural backbone, stripping away the friction of boilerplate setup. When fused with the autonomous capabilities of Claude Code, you aren't just coding—you are executing a high-velocity sprint to market. Let’s turn your analysis paralysis into a deployed asset.

steps.title: Define the High-Value Micro-Niche
steps.description: Don't build for everyone. Use the template to target a specific, painful B2B workflow. We identify the 'hair-on-fire' problem first.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current SaaS landscape for high-churn B2B workflows and suggest 3 micro-SaaS pivot points that solve specific data-entry bottlenecks.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Deploy the core architecture. This sets up your authentication, database schema, and API routes in one command.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, scalable SaaS boilerplate using the Antigravity template, including Stripe integration and Supabase auth.

steps.title: Build the Core Value Loop
steps.description: Focus only on the feature that solves the primary pain point. Everything else is secondary noise.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an automated workflow that ingest user input, processes it via LLM, and outputs a formatted, monetizable report.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'implement core business logic for report generation'

steps.title: Integrate Monetization Hooks
steps.description: If the user can't pay you, you don't have a business. Wire up the billing logic immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure Stripe webhooks to handle subscription tiering and feature gating based on the user's plan.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file src/lib/stripe.ts --instruction 'add logic for tiered feature access'

steps.title: Deploy and Validate
steps.description: Push to production. Real user feedback is the only metric that matters for an intermediate founder.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a deployment script for Vercel and create a landing page copy optimized for high-conversion signups.

pro_tips: Always build the cancellation flow before the sign-up flow; it teaches you about your churn triggers early.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your payment logic before writing the UI; it forces structural integrity.
If your MVP takes more than 14 days to build, you are over-engineering; cut features until it takes 7.
Treat your database schema as a living document; use Antigravity to refactor it as you learn user pain points.
Automate your feedback loop by having Claude Code summarize support tickets into product backlog items daily.
content.next_steps: Once deployed, run a 48-hour cold outreach campaign to 50 potential users. Analyze the conversion metrics, iterate the feature set using Claude Code, and pivot or scale based on actual revenue data.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for inspiration and start building your legacy. The market rewards speed, not perfection. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
